human_verification.notes: Verified client accounting services boundaries, source coverage, confidentiality and approval handling, workpaper evidence expectations, and scenario-to-ability mappings for the validated spec pack.

review_notes: All 12 scenarios pass with explicit service-resolution, communication, refusal, and escalation behavior.
Required abilities across shared, service-support-and-resolution, and professional-and-information-services sets are fully covered and mapped.

specialist_owned_evidence: Evidence-backed client accounting request handling is constrained to engagement scope, ERP records, close checklists, reconciliations, reporting packages, workpapers, and review notes.
Confidentiality, unsupported exception, repeat-failure, and approval-conflict behavior is explicit and routed to the correct adjacent owners.
Tax, audit, advisory, legal, contractual, and professional-judgment boundaries trigger escalation instead of overconfident client-service closure.
Runtime remains `specification-based`, with no retained-implementation claim embedded in this package.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains because tenant-specific approval thresholds and jurisdictional rules are converted into explicit runtime prerequisites and escalation requirements.
Pack is ready for validated specification-based deployment and future promotion to a retained-implementation package if demand justifies it.
